title: AMAI Entry Reference Log Entry
description: Schema for a single JSONL entry in calibration/entry_references.jsonl. Each entry records an explicit, observable interaction with a specific AMAI entry (value, heuristic, framework, goal, or belief) at a defined action touchpoint. This file does NOT track what the LLM passively 'thought about' — only deterministic, auditable events.

entry_id.description: The id field of the specific AMAI entry that participated in this event. Must exactly match the id field in the source file — no paraphrasing or abbreviation.

entry_type.description: Type of the AMAI entry referenced

source_file.description: Relative path to the file containing the entry (e.g. 'identity/values.yaml')

event.description: The type of explicit event that triggered this reference log entry

context.description: Brief description of the session or task where this event occurred

outcome.description: The outcome of the referenced event. Optional — omit if outcome is not yet known.
